name: ted@tedcruz.org
subject: your gift
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Merry Christmas, Friend. I'd like to give you something special -- but I can only swing it if you activate your Cruz Crew membership BEFORE January 1st! |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Merry Christmas, Friend.

I'd like to give you something special -- but I can only swing it if you [_activate your Cruz Crew membership BEFORE January 1st!_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)

_[**Follow this personalized link to make a reoccurring contribution of $25 & I'll tell my staff to activate your membership effective today >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)_[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)

**And as a small gift of special thanks, I'll send you this pin along with your official CRUZ CREW card as a symbol of my appreciation.**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)

Please, keep this card in your wallet and wear this pin with pride as your token of support for my campaign.

You see: your early involvement is key to building our momentum -- words cannot express how much Heidi and I appreciate EVERYTHING you're doing in this fight!

Dedicated and courageous conservatives, like you, are putting my message in front of voters, and winning over family, friends, and neighbors one new supporter at a time.

Friend, this is how we'll win the Republican nomination, and take on the Washington Cartel to win the White House. This is how we'll reignite the promise of America.

As one of my most dedicated conservative supporters, I want to get your CRUZ CREW membership card today.

_[**Follow this personalized link to make a reoccurring contribution of $25 & activate your membership card, effective today >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)_[****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)

I'm focused on fighting and winning -- uniting the GOP to defeat Hillary.

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. When my staff activates your membership -- they'll also send you my limited edition pin as a special thanks.

[** Donate **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32372550:WHArHiyNv:m:1:1104269936:4E6676D0EF581DA894D508F5CBBCE46C:r)

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Doug Stafford
subject: We did it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

Following Tuesday's debate, we asked for your help to prove Rand won [by contributing to our $200,000 moneybomb.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32375750:s9_2MiyxN:m:1:879035888:83BA6222CD3BEE984C417FA8ED38EB48:r)

**You came through! We made our goal! **

I wanted to say a quick thank you. I'm so happy to tell Rand about the flood of support that followed his debate performance.

Rand has been fighting for the policies that matter most.

* Opposing the big spending omnibus
* Securing a vote on Audit the Fed for just a few weeks from now
* Supporting legislation that strengthens American security by further screening for refugees from Jihadists countries
* Pushing for stronger 2nd Amendment rights for Americans

And now we see, the American people are jumping on board with Rand. That's because conservative solutions really make sense. And they really work.
**We're in this race to win it - and we will. Iowa and beyond. ** I'm happy to Stand with Rand.

[Will you continue to stand with us?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32375750:s9_2MiyxN:m:1:879035888:83BA6222CD3BEE984C417FA8ED38EB48:r)

In Liberty,
Doug Stafford | | [Pitch in $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32375750:s9_2MiyxN:m:1:879035888:83BA6222CD3BEE984C417FA8ED38EB48:r)
---

[Pitch in $75 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32375752:s9_2MiyxN:m:1:879035888:83BA6222CD3BEE984C417FA8ED38EB48:r)

name: Team Katie
subject: Bumper stickers are here!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend --

Your car, your laptop, your fishbowl... Well, maybe not the fishbowl... What do all these things have in common?

They are all missing a Katie McGinty for Senate bumper sticker!

That's right, official Katie McGinty for Senate bumper stickers have arrived! And by chipping in $3, you can be amongst the first to own a sticker to show your support for Katie.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-bumper-sticker?refcode=e20151218&refcode2=e20151218&amount=3"

By donating $3 to the campaign, you can affirm your support for Katie and all that she stands for. You can use your sticker to stand up for raising the minimum wage, renewable energy, and making middle class families' lives easier. You can do your part by showing the rest of the world that you care about the same issues as Katie!

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-bumper-sticker?refcode=e20151218&refcode2=e20151218&amount=3"

Thank you for your support and we are excited to see the new stickers decorating Pennsylvania!

Team Katie

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-bumper-sticker?refcode=e20151218&refcode2=e20151218&amount=3"

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-2900779847536082944/423640730670465024.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, FL, GA, ID, IN, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQyODYyNzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAxOTY4OTI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Rubio can't be bothered to fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot:

If the American people can't trust Senator Marco Rubio to keep his promises and do the job he was elected to do, how in the world can we trust him to be president?

Yesterday, as I heard Senate Majority Leader Harry Reid gloating after passage of $1.1 TRILLION omnibus spending bill that he bragged "capped off a successful year for Senate Democrats," I couldn't help but wonder, where all of my Republican colleagues who told the American people they would fight President Obama's agenda?

**One Senator, Marco Rubio, couldn't even be bothered to show up . . . again.**

[My campaign just cut a brand-new ad highlighting Senator Rubio's chronic absenteeism, which I hope you'll take a moment to watch.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377919:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377919:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)
**Patriot, if Senator Rubio is too busy running for President to stand with conservatives and fight President Obama's radicalism, he should stop ripping off taxpayers. Period.**

At least then, patriots like you and me would have an opportunity to have a true conservative standing beside us in the Senate instead of a Senator who puts his own personal ambitions ahead of doing the job he promised voters to do.

If you agree, [I hope you'll please agree to your most generous contribution to help me run this ad far and wide.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377920:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)

Whatever you can do -- [whether it's $50, $25 or even $10 -- will help my campaign run this ad far and wide.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377920:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)

In Liberty,
Rand Paul | | [Pitch in $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377920:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)
---
[Pitch in $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377921:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)
[Pitch in $75 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377922:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)
[Pitch in $100 TODAY>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377923:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32377924:W4W8ZiyNv:m:1:879035888:0D90FFB40E6F9C82F2FB1598D3E4FCDE:r)

name: Josh Wolf
subject: URGENT: New Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

We can't afford to ignore this: **A shady SuperPAC just launched an all-out attack on Patrick. **

They've seen recent poll numbers showing this race flush with undecided voters. They think that if they get their smears out now, voters will believe them. They are right.

**I would be lying if I said I wasn 't worried about this attack. We have to fight back NOW if we want the voters to know the truth.**

[**We 're starting a Rapid Response Fund. In order to hit back against these lies we need $10,000 in the next 24 hours. Will you step up and help us fight back?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2188/738133e4/3beac538/7f836a54/3007692454/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151220?refcode=pme151220_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

**This new attack is a complete distortion of Patrick 's record, but that's how right-wing SuperPACs work.** Patrick is the strongest candidate in this race. So they'll twist his record any way they can, trying to make Floridians believe Patrick is something he's not.

**We have to fight back every time an attack like this is launched.** We cannot let distortions about Patrick's record go uncorrected.

[**We don 't have much time. Help get our Rapid Response Fund up to $10,000 in the next 24 hours. Click here and make a contribution.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2188/738133e4/3beac538/7f836a54/3007692454/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151220?refcode=pme151220_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thanks,

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Patrick Murphy for Senate | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2188/738133e4/3beac538/7f836a55/3007692454/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Team Rand
subject: Phone for Liberty & Win Prizes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Friend,

The Phone for Liberty Bracket Challenge is
well underway -- we have hundreds of volunteers making calls from
home all week long!

As you know, Rand has challenged Congressmen
Amash, Labrador, Lummis, Massie, and Mulvaney to build teams of
dedicated supporters who will compete against each other in a
Phone from Home Challenge.

Will you sign up and begin calling today?

As a reward for your hard work, Rand will
autograph some awesome prizes for our best callers. Take a look
--

#1 Caller on the 1st Place Team
Autographed Time Magazine

#2-5 Callers on the 1st Place Team

Autographed Eye Chart

#1 Caller on the 2nd-5th Place Teams

Autographed Baseballs

Sign up HERE to get started.

Let's get calling!

-Team Rand

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
subject: It's back, team. Now let's use it.
body:
#
# It's back, team. Now let's use it.
**Host: **Fellow Bernie Supporter in Bethesda
**What:** Bernie Phone Bank Potluck
**Where:** Bethesda
4801 Fairmont Ave Apt 706
Bethesda, MD 20814
**When:** Saturday, December 19th
3:00 pm EST
**[Yes, I'll be there.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vp3l)**
**[Click here for more information or to RSVP»](http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=&distance=20&eventtype=CW&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=distance)**
Thanks to an incredible response from Bernie supporters like you, we again have access to our voter contact data and tools.
This weekend, we're massively scaling up our voter contact operation with a new Web-based call tool that lets you talk to even more voters than was possible before.
Help the campaign show the political establishment what democracy looks like by creating a massive spike in voter contact by Bernie volunteers.
\- Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
P.S: Can't make it Saturday? **[Check our map for other phone banking parties and find more events near you.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29e9/43f17890/4a5cb447/6210d3c4/1466992021/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=CW&eventtype=E&eventtype=D&eventtype=B&daterange=all-events&sort=distance")**

** **

** **
** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29e9/43f17890/4a5cb447/6210d3c5/1466992021/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29e9/43f17890/4a5cb447/6210d3c2/1466992021/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29e9/43f17890/4a5cb447/6210d3c3/1466992021/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29e9/43f17890/4a5cb447/6210d3c0/1466992021/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Look -- I'm worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends --

For months, conservative SuperPACs have been circling the Florida Senate race like sharks prepared to strike. Well, after the Kochs and Rove gave the signal by attacking me, the suspense is over. **A SuperPac just launched an all-out attack on me.**

_I knew it was coming, friends._ If I had to guess, I would say they were inspired by the latest poll showing this race has a good deal of undecided voters out there.

**That 's why we have to fight back.** This SuperPAC is trying to lie about my record in order to scare those undecided voters. We can't let this smear campaign go without a strong response.

[**This state is going blue, and the Senate is going to follow. You can step up and make it happen by contributing to our Rapid Response Fund. We NEED to raise $10,000 in the next 24 hours to silence this SuperPac.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2186/738133e4/3be841e6/7f836ba0/3655798484/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151219b?refcode=pme151219b_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

When you see attack ads against me, remember these SuperPACs are not just trying to distort my record.

This ad plays on the worst fears in our country. It's fear-mongering and it's utterly inaccurate. Sadly, Republicans will get away with these scare tactics by running them through dark-money, nearly-unaccountable SuperPACS. | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2186/738133e4/3be841e6/7f836ba0/3655798484/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151219b?refcode=pme151219b_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Am I worried? Yes, this is tough. [**But we have you making sure we have the resources we need to set the record straight and fight back. Will you step up?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2186/738133e4/3be841e6/7f836ba0/3655798484/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151219b?refcode=pme151219b_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Let's be honest about what the Republican endgame is here: they're trying to keep control of the Senate in Republican hands, plain and simple. _And if it comes down to lying and scaring Floridians into voting for them, they will._

The stakes are high, and they're going to stay that way. But if we can stick together and answer every big-money attack with an organized, grassroots response -- come November 2016, Florida and the Senate will be as blue as Florida beaches.

[**There are only 24 hours left to reach our Rapid Response goal of $55,000. We DON 'T have much time to waste. Click here to make a contribution now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2186/738133e4/3be841e6/7f836ba0/3655798484/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151219b?refcode=pme151219b_b&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Patrick

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2186/738133e4/3be841e6/7f836ba1/3655798484/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

clean_body: | Friends -- For months, conservative SuperPACs have been circling the Florida Senate race like sharks prepared to strike. Well, after the Kochs and Rove gave the signal by attacking me, the suspense is over. A SuperPac just launched an all-out attack on me. I knew it was coming, friends. If I had to guess, I would say they were inspired by the latest poll showing this race has a good deal of undecided voters out there. That 's why we have to fight back. This SuperPAC is trying to lie about my record in order to scare those undecided voters. We can't let this smear campaign go without a strong response. "" When you see attack ads against me, remember these SuperPACs are not just trying to distort my record. This ad plays on the worst fears in our country. It's fear-mongering and it's utterly inaccurate. Sadly, Republicans will get away with these scare tactics by running them through dark-money, nearly-unaccountable SuperPACS. | "" Am I worried? Yes, this is tough. "" Let's be honest about what the Republican endgame is here: they're trying to keep control of the Senate in Republican hands, plain and simple. And if it comes down to lying and scaring Floridians into voting for them, they will. The stakes are high, and they're going to stay that way. But if we can stick together and answer every big-money attack with an organized, grassroots response -- come November 2016, Florida and the Senate will be as blue as Florida beaches. "" Thank you, Patrick | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

subject: Hillary, Bernie, or O'Malley? [short survey]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
In just a few hours, the Democrats will take the stage for their FINAL debate of the year.

One of these candidates could very well be facing off against Donald Trump or Ted Cruz next year for President of the United States. _We don 't need to tell you just how high the stakes are_.

We're doing our part to make sure we're prepared. But we need your input to help us develop our nationwide 2016 campaign strategy.

**So please, take just a moment and fill out our quick survey:**

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Election-Survey**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea757/e60883a/703cb175/144233ce/3079315627/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Election-Survey?source=MS_EM_PET_2015.12.19_B1_election-survey_X__F1_S2_C1__ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326")

Thanks for sharing your input,

_BOLD PAC_

| |

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea757/e60883a/703cb175/144233cc/3079315627/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea757/e60883a/703cb175/144233cc/3079315627/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
